Name: Octopus - Check Targets Available
Description: Checks for the presence of targets with the specified tag. If no targets are found, the deployment will fail with the provided message.

Parameters.Name: CheckTargets.Octopus.Api.Key
Parameters.Label: Octopus API Key
Parameters.HelpText: The API key used to query the Octopus instance.

Parameters.Name: CheckTargets.Octopus.Role
Parameters.Label: Target Tag to Check
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the target tag to check for.

Parameters.Name: CheckTargets.Message
Parameters.Label: Message to display if tags not found
Parameters.HelpText: An optional custom message to display if no targets are found with the specified tag.
